rule CDB_July_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for July 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 622 Vulnerabilities Including Two Exp"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-22"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-65013 - Onlook tRPC Insecure Direct Object Referenc"; content:"CVE-2026-65013"; nocase; sid:2553366; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: RefluXFS: LPE in the Linux kernel via XFS reflink race (CVE-"; content:"CVE-2026-64600"; nocase; sid:6021123; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: RefluXFS: A Linux Kernel Local Privilege Escalation to Root "; content:"CVE-2026-64600"; nocase; sid:2978352; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
